info.title: Writing
info.description: Enhance your writing with tools for creation, editing, and style refinement

display.name: Writing Assistant
display.description: Edits and improves text with detailed tone analysis and explanations.
prompt_starters: Improve and polish this text
Fix grammar and enhance clarity
Analyze the tone of this writing
🪄 Try a powerful new GPT 🪄

display.name: Novel Writer
display.description: Writes full length, coherent, dynamic fiction novel books.
prompt_starters: Can you give me ideas for a 1950s thriller mystery?
Write a sci-fi horror story with a surprising twist.
Give me five ideas for a fantasy novel about an alchemist.
Tell me more about Novel Writer and how to use it.

display.name: Copywriter GPT - Marketing, Branding, Ads
display.description: Your innovative specialist for scroll-stopping ad copywriting. Viral marketing strategies fine-tuned to your needs! [New] Now supports Image Ads
prompt_starters: I need an advertisement idea for my product campaign.
Craft the perfect Ad copy for my luxury brand.
[Bonus] Build my business website in 1 min! 🌐
[New] Craft an Image Ad

info.title: B12 AI Websites
info.description: Create a professional, engaging, and user-friendly website for your business in seconds using AI.

post.summary: Create a website for the business

link.description: The link to claim newly designed website.

business_description.description: The short description of the business in less than 1000 characters.

cid.description: cid received in previous create website response.

website_hero_subtitle.description: The short and catchy subtitle for hero section of the website in less than 5-10 words. It should capture the goal of the website. It should never mention anything about the website color, style or structure.

display.name: Cover Letter
display.description: Boost interviews with compelling cover letters tailored to job applications  - simple, quick, effective.
prompt_starters: Build My Cover Letter
Tailor Resume to Job Description

post.summary: Add user to waitlist with authentication

display.name: Legal & Contracts (Lawyer-Backed/Not Legal Advice)
display.description: 🏆 The world’s leading legal AI--backed by 2,000+ lawyers on demand. Use the chatbot to instantly draft contracts and conduct research then loop in an attorney to verify. Powered by www.Inhouse.app. (Disclaimer: AI is not a lawyer and cannot give legal advice. Always consult an attorney)
prompt_starters: Start here
Review Document
Ask Legal Question
Draft Document

info.title: Inhouse API
info.description: API for generating documents and submitting referral leads.

post.summary: Generate a link to continue document generation at Inhouse
post.description: Sends a summary of the conversation to Inhouse so the document generation can continue there.

user_requirements.description: A description of user requirements for document generation. Make this as detailed as possible and make sure you add all the details provided by the user

document_title.description: A title for the document being generated

document_uploaded.description: True if the user uploaded a document during the conversation which was not shared on this API call. False if the user did not upload a document.

200.description: Successfully generated the document and returned an access URL.

url.description: A URL to continue document generation in Inhouse.

post.summary: Generate a link to continue legal advise at Inhouse
post.description: Sends a summary of the conversation to Inhouse to continue with the process of connecting with a lawyer.

user_requirements.description: A description of user requirements for legal review request. Make this as detailed as possible and make sure you add all the details provided by the user

document_uploaded.description: True if the user uploaded a document during the conversation which was not shared on this API call. False if the user did not upload a document.

200.description: Successfully generated the lawyer review request and returned an access URL.

url.description: A URL to continue with Inhouse

display.name: Video AI Generator Maker Text to Video GPT Free
display.description: Create stunning AI videos from text instantly. The #1 Free AI Video Generator & Text to Video Maker. Make viral content, animate images, and generate professional results effortlessly.
prompt_starters: Let’s create a viral social video together!
Let's create a marketing video.
Let's create an explainer video.
#help

info.title: invideo AI
info.description: Plugin for crafting narrated videos from text prompts and scripts.

post.summary: Generate video from a detailed brief.

brief.description: Plain english text describing the video brief.

settings.description: Instructions such as gender, accent of the voiceover, and tone of the background music. Can be empty.

platforms.description: Array of platforms this video would be ideal for.

audiences.description: Array of target audiences this video would be ideal for.

length_in_minutes.description: Length of the video in minutes.

openaiFileIdRefs.description: List of images to include in the video. JPG, WEBP, and PNG are supported.

video_url.description: URL link to the generated video.

script.description: Plain english text containing the script of the video.

settings.description: Instructions such as gender, accent of the voiceover, and tone of the background music. Can be empty.

platforms.description: Array of platforms this video would be ideal for.

audiences.description: Array of target audiences this video would be ideal for.

length_in_minutes.description: Length of the video in minutes.

openaiFileIdRefs.description: List of images to include in the video. JPG, WEBP, and PNG are supported.

video_url.description: URL link to the generated video.

display.name: CV/Resume writer ✍️
display.description: 🔴 Build or rewrite a professional, ATS-optimized Resume or CV 🔴 that wins interviews.
prompt_starters: Resume/CV creation from scratch
Upload you Resume/CV to get started
As a new user what can Resume Writer do for me?
What is ATS (Applicant Tracking System)?

post.summary: Upload CV info and receive a URL in return.

cv_text.description: The full CV information as a string to be processed.

display.name: Write For Me
prompt_starters: In the age of AI, what’s the smartest upper-income career strategy for someone just starting college?
What are some little known hacks for being a naturally charming person?
What tiny daily habit has the biggest long-term payoff?
Write essay summarizing the East India Company
